# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function adminDashboardReport(PDO $pdo): array
{
    $pdo->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE, PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION);

    $post = $_POST ?? [];

    $dateFrom = isset($post['date_from']) ? trim((string)$post['date_from']) : '';
    $dateTo   = isset($post['date_to']) ? trim((string)$post['date_to']) : '';
    $status   = $post['status'] ?? null;
    $category = $post['category'] ?? null;

    $limit  = isset($post['limit']) ? (int)$post['limit'] : 50;
    $offset = isset($post['offset']) ? (int)$post['offset'] : 0;

    if ($limit < 1) $limit = 50;
    if ($limit > 500) $limit = 500;
    if ($offset < 0) $offset = 0;

    $dateColumn = 'created_at';

    $where = [];
    $params = [];

    $normalizeList = static function ($value): array {
        if (is_array($value)) {
            $arr = $value;
        } else {
            $value = (string)$value;
            $arr = preg_split('/\s*,\s*/', $value, -1, PREG_SPLIT_NO_EMPTY) ?: [];
        }
        $out = [];
        foreach ($arr as $v) {
            $v = trim((string)$v);
            if ($v === '' || strtolower($v) === 'all') continue;
            $out[] = $v;
        }
        return array_values(array_unique($out));
    };

    $parseDate = static function (string $s): ?DateTimeImmutable {
        $s = trim($s);
        if ($s === '') return null;

        $formats = ['Y-m-d', 'Y-m-d H:i:s', 'm/d/Y', DateTimeInterface::ATOM, DateTimeInterface::RFC3339_EXTENDED];
        foreach ($formats as $f) {
            $dt = DateTimeImmutable::createFromFormat($f, $s);
            if ($dt instanceof DateTimeImmutable) return $dt;
        }

        $ts = strtotime($s);
        if ($ts !== false) return (new DateTimeImmutable())->setTimestamp($ts);

        return null;
    };

    $fromDt = $parseDate($dateFrom);
    $toDt   = $parseDate($dateTo);

    if ($fromDt && !$toDt) {
        $toDt = $fromDt->setTime(23, 59, 59);
        $fromDt = $fromDt->setTime(0, 0, 0);
    } elseif (!$fromDt && $toDt) {
        $fromDt = $toDt->setTime(0, 0, 0);
        $toDt = $toDt->setTime(23, 59, 59);
    } elseif ($fromDt && $toDt) {
        $fromDt = $fromDt->setTime(0, 0, 0);
        $toDt = $toDt->setTime(23, 59, 59);
        if ($toDt < $fromDt) {
            [$fromDt, $toDt] = [$toDt->setTime(0,0,0), $fromDt->setTime(23,59,59)];
        }
    }

    if ($fromDt && $toDt) {
        $where[] = "r.$dateColumn BETWEEN :date_from AND :date_to";
        $params[':date_from'] = $fromDt->format('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        $params[':date_to']   = $toDt->format('Y-m-d H:i:s');
    }

    $statusList = $normalizeList($status ?? '');
    if (!empty($statusList)) {
        $in = [];
        foreach ($statusList as $i => $val) {
            $ph = ":status_$i";
            $in[] = $ph;
            $params[$ph] = $val;
        }
        $where[] = "r.status IN (" . implode(',', $in) . ")";
    }

    $categoryList = $normalizeList($category ?? '');
    if (!empty($categoryList)) {
        $in = [];
        foreach ($categoryList as $i => $val) {
            $ph = ":category_$i";
            $in[] = $ph;
            $params[$ph] = $val;
        }
        $where[] = "r.category IN (" . implode(',', $in) . ")";
    }

    $whereSql = $where ? ("WHERE " . implode(" AND ", $where)) : "";

    $allowedGroupBy = [
        'day' => "DATE(r.$dateColumn)",
        'month' => "DATE_FORMAT(r.$dateColumn, '%Y-%m-01')",
        'status' => "r.status",
        'category' => "r.category",
    ];
    $groupByKey = isset($post['group_by']) ? strtolower(trim((string)$post['group_by'])) : '';
    $groupExpr = $allowedGroupBy[$groupByKey] ?? "DATE(r.$dateColumn)";

    $allowedOrder = [
        'date_asc' => "$groupExpr ASC",
        'date_desc' => "$groupExpr DESC",
        'count_asc' => "total_count ASC",
        'count_desc' => "total_count DESC",
        'amount_asc' => "total_amount ASC",
        'amount_desc' => "total_amount DESC",
    ];
    $orderKey = isset($post['order']) ? strtolower(trim((string)$post['order'])) : 'date_desc';
    $orderSql = $allowedOrder[$orderKey] ?? $allowedOrder['date_desc'];

    $baseFrom = "FROM reports r";

    $sqlSummary = "
        SELECT
            $groupExpr AS bucket,
            COUNT(*) AS total_count,
            COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount
        $baseFrom
        $whereSql
        GROUP BY bucket
        ORDER BY $orderSql
        LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset
    ";

    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sqlSummary);
    foreach ($params as $k => $v) {
        $stmt->bindValue($k, $v);
    }
    $stmt->bindValue(':limit', $limit, PDO::PARAM_INT);
    $stmt->bindValue(':offset', $offset, PDO::PARAM_INT);
    $stmt->execute();
    $summary = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    $sqlTotals = "
        SELECT
            COUNT(*) AS total_count,
            COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount,
            COALESCE(AVG(r.amount), 0) AS avg_amount,
            COALESCE(MIN(r.amount), 0) AS min_amount,
            COALESCE(MAX(r.amount), 0) AS max_amount
        $baseFrom
        $whereSql
    ";

    $stmt2 = $pdo->prepare($sqlTotals);
    foreach ($params as $k => $v) {
        $stmt2->bindValue($k, $v);
    }
    $stmt2->execute();
    $totals = $stmt2->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC) ?: [
        'total_count' => 0,
        'total_amount' => 0,
        'avg_amount' => 0,
        'min_amount' => 0,
        'max_amount' => 0,
    ];

    $sqlRecent = "
        SELECT
            r.id,
            r.$dateColumn AS created_at,
            r.status,
            r.category,
            r.amount
        $baseFrom
        $whereSql
        ORDER BY r.$dateColumn DESC
        LIMIT 20
    ";
    $stmt3 = $pdo->prepare($sqlRecent);
    foreach ($params as $k => $v) {
        $stmt3->bindValue($k, $v);
    }
    $stmt3->execute();
    $recent = $stmt3->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    return [
        'filters' => [
            'date_from' => $fromDt ? $fromDt->format('Y-m-d') : null,
            'date_to' => $toDt ? $toDt->format('Y-m-d') : null,
            'status' => $statusList,
            'category' => $categoryList,
            'group_by' => $groupByKey ?: 'day',
            'order' => $orderKey ?: 'date_desc',
            'limit' => $limit,
            'offset' => $offset,
        ],
        'totals' => $totals,
        'summary' => $summary,
        'recent' => $recent,
    ];
}
